content: Remote OK Strategic Business Development Consultant Vonage Join Vonage and help us innovate cloud communications for businesses worldwide!Vonage Communications APIsAs an emerging leader in the $10B+ communications API market, we empower global brands to connect better with their customers, employees, and partners through transformative communications experiences. Vonage API solutions empower organizations to build their custom omnichannel communications structure â reaching and engaging customers on their preferred schedule and channel, including voice, video, and messaging. Think of a rideshare service instantly connecting with customers, hospital staff conducting remote monitoring, customers verifying their identity before completing a purchase, AI virtual agents servicing customers around the clock, and much more.Why this role mattersThe Strategic Business Development Manager â Network Powered Solutions (NwPS) is responsible for identifying, shaping, and incubating new growth opportunities to expand the NwPS addressable market and build a sustainable, multi-year pipeline. Operating at the intersection of market sensing, partnerships, and solution incubation, you'll ensure NwPS solutions are built in alignment with customer demand and ahead of competitive shifts â with a focus on opportunity creation that converts into revenue over a 12â36 month horizon.Your key responsibilitiesMarket & Opportunity Discoveryâ¢ Identify emerging market needs, industry inflection points, and new monetisation models aligned with corporate strategyâ¢ Develop and validate new use cases, vertical plays, and solution concepts that can scale over timeâ¢ Conduct structured market analysis (TAM, value pools, buying centres, competitive dynamics)Pipeline Incubationâ¢ Build and maintain a future-year opportunity pipeline (12â36 months) with clear conversion paths into sales executionâ¢ Seed early-stage opportunities through pilots, design partnerships, and proofs of valueâ¢ Work with Sales Overlay and core sales teams to transition mature opportunities into active sales motions consultant, design, growth Spain 2026-04-30T22:00:47+00:00 1131403 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-strategic-business-development-consultant-vonage-1131403 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Founding Engineer Haast <h1>Founding Engineer (US)</h1><p style="min-height:1.5em">Build the AI platform that's rewriting a $50B industry</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"><em>Salary range - $180-220k USD + Equity + Benefits </em></p><p style="min-height:1.5em"><br /></p><h2>About Haast</h2><p style="min-height:1.5em">We're building one of the first agentic systems for enterprise legal and compliance teams that actually automates their manual work. End-to-end. Delivering 80% faster compliance reviews and 4x productivity gains.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em">We recently closed a $12M USD Series A (Peak XV Partners, DST Global, Airtree) and are growing fast in the US; building the infrastructure that will completely re-define how enterprises think about compliance.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em">Think Canva for design. Atlassian for projects. Haast for compliance.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"><br /></p><h2>The Problem</h2><p style="min-height:1.5em">Compliance is a $50B global challenge. Enterprise legal and compliance teams spend a significant amount of time manually reviewing documents against policy, spotting regulatory risk, and signing off on content before go-to-market. It's painful and it's mission-critical.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em">We're building the infrastructure that makes this manageable at scale. You'll be working on systems that directly reduce risk and unlock productivity for some of the world's largest organisations.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"><br /></p><h2>The Role</h2><p style="min-height:1.5em">As our first US based Engineer; you'll be the technical bridge between our product vision and our customers' reality. </p><p style="min-height:1.5em">You're a full-stack engineer who thrives at the intersection of innovation and execution, building our platform while staying connected to the teams actually using it.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em">You'll split your time between heads-down building (shipping code that matters) and being engaged with customers, understanding their pain points firsthand, iterating on features in real-time, and using that feedback to shape our product direction. </p><p style="min-height:1.5em">You'll own end-to-end technical decisions: designing systems, shipping to production, and iterating based on direct customer interaction.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em">This is high-autonomy work. You'll collaborate directly with our founding team, move at startup velocity, and have genuine influence over both our architecture and product roadmap.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><h2>What You'll Own</h2><ul style="min-height:1.5em"><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Design, architect, and ship full-stack features that directly solve our customers compliance challenges</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Own the technical relationship with key customers; implementing solutions, gathering requirements, and translating feedback into product improvements</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Build scalable services and APIs that power our LLM compliance platform while keeping the customer experience front and center</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Make high-impact technical decisions quickly, knowing that you'll be accountable to both our engineering standards and our customers</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Challenge assumptions on "why" and "how", you'll directly influence what we build and how we build it</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">Shape our product roadmap and engineering practices as we scale from Series A to market leadership</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p></li></ul><h2>Who We're Looking For</h2><ul style="min-height:1.5em"><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">You've built full-stack systems at meaningful scale; you're equally comfortable architecting backend services and shipping frontend code that customers interact with daily</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">You're deep on one or more of: Go, Node.js/TypeScript, or Python, and you're fluent enough across the stack to own features end-to-end</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">You understand APIs, distributed systems, and the tradeoffs between speed and reliability in production environments</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">You genuinely enjoy working with customers; you're not just shipping features, you want to understand the human problem you're solving</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">You've shipped in fast-moving environments and understand what it takes to move quickly without breaking things</p></li><li><p style="min-height:1.5em">You&#03
